basic_details.job_title: SGPGIMS Study Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Sanjay Gandhi Postgraduate Institute of Medical Sciences (SGPGIMS)
basic_details.short_information: Sanjay Gandhi Postgraduate Institute of Medical Sciences (SGPGIMS) Study Coordinator Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 01 vacancy has been announced through the SGPGIMS Study Coordinator Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Study Coordinator: Master in Life Science/Clinical Research. Experience: Some Experience in Clinical drug trials (Preference will be given to those who having experience in indication of Neurology drug trials.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for SGPGIMS Study Coordinator Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the SGPGIMS Study Coordinator position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the Study Coordinator post is 10 June 2026. It is advisable to send your application well in advance of this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Study Coordinator role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Study Coordinator position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 25,000. This is a contractual role, and the salary is fixed per month.

faq.question: Q3. What are the essential qualifications required for the Study Coordinator post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Study Coordinator position, candidates must possess a Master's degree in Life Science or Clinical Research. Relevant experience in clinical drug trials is also preferred.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the SGPGIMS Study Coordinator recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the Study Coordinator position are to be submitted via email. You need to send your bio-data and required documents to the official email address specified in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the SGPGIMS Study Coordinator recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Study Coordinator position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Study Coordinator role involves an initial email application followed by an interview. Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria will be shortlisted for the interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies for the Study Coordinator post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Study Coordinator position at the Sanjay Gandhi Postgraduate Institute of Medical Sciences (SGPGIMS).

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The Study Coordinator position is a contractual job. This means the appointment will be for a fixed tenure as per the terms and conditions of the institute.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the SGPGIMS located?
faq.answer: Sanjay Gandhi Postgraduate Institute of Medical Sciences (SGPGIMS) is located in Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh. The recruitment is for a position within this institute.

faq.question: Q10. What is the interview date for the Study Coordinator role?
faq.answer: The interview for the Study Coordinator position is scheduled to be held on 12 July 2024. Candidates who apply via email will be informed about the interview details.
